response_constraints: Retrieve the existing summary before issuing the dependent summary update.
Confirm the change only after memory_update_summary succeeds, without claiming unrelated memories changed.

stages.purpose: Read the current recursive summary so its unrelated facts can be preserved.

arguments.summary: Regional conference: keynote confirmed. Room B holds 96. Registration closes June 4.

stages.purpose: Write the revised full summary after incorporating the retrieved content and the user's single requested change.

state_assertions: summary == "Regional conference: keynote confirmed. Room B holds 96. Registration closes June 4."

prompt: Retrieve the regional-conference summary and update Room B's capacity from 80 to 96 without changing the keynote or registration deadline.

tool_results.summary: Regional conference: keynote confirmed. Room B holds 80. Registration closes June 4.
